app.title: PhoneMic
app.subtitle: Phone-mic voice input
app.banner.no_lan: No LAN detected. Please connect to Wi-Fi.
home.untitled.desc: Please pair with the desktop app first by scanning the QR code or entering the 8-digit pairing code.
home.history.title: History
pair.title: Pair
pair.scan.title: Scan QR code
pair.scan.desc: Point your phone camera at the QR code shown on the desktop app.
pair.scan.permission_denied: Camera permission is required to scan the QR code.
pair.manual.title: Enter pairing code
pair.manual.desc: Type the 8-character pairing code shown on the desktop to finish pairing.
pair.invalid: Pairing code is invalid or expired. Please try again.
pair.ratelimit: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
settings.title: Settings
error.OS_UNSUPPORTED: This operating system version is not supported.
error.PORT_UNAVAILABLE: Failed to bind a listening port. Check your network or firewall.
error.PAIR_INVALID: Pairing code is invalid or expired.
error.PAIR_RATELIMIT: Too many pairing attempts. Please try again later.
error.AUTH_REQUIRED: A valid session token is required. Please pair again.
error.FORBIDDEN_SUBNET: Request origin is not on a trusted subnet.
error.INJECT_NO_FOCUS_TARGET: No focused window available for keyboard injection.
reconnect.failed.title: Cannot reach the desktop
reconnect.failed.desc: Five reconnect attempts failed. Please check your network and retry.
